programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: On the A1 near Leeds, an intoxicated driver rams a police car before heading the wrong way down the dual carriageway and the cops instigate a risky containment manoeuvre to bring him to a standstill. In Halifax, a criminal's wellbeing becomes officers' primary concern after they discover a trail of blood at the scene of an apparent drink-related crash

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Highlights of the documentary giving an insight into the working life of officers patrolling the nation's roads as they combine modern technology and old-fashioned methods to bring criminals to justice. Officers pursue a drug runner down one of the UK's busiest motorways, and a drug deal results in a white-knuckle race through Bradford's back streets

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers Hayley and Ben can barely believe their eyes when they encounter a drunk driver in the fast lane of the M6, and dog handler Glenn is given a crash course in marine rescue when he answers an emergency distress call. Plus, a monster-truck owner tries to give police the slip and a pizza-delivery driver gets a special order from the interceptors

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A huge haul of cash is uncovered during a routine stop, leaving Duggie speechless, and a van driver tries to ram an interceptor on the busy M6. Meanwhile, Hayley and Ben rush to a frightening accident on the motorway, dog-handler Barry catches a burglar and the air ambulance is scrambled to a crash involving a school bus on a country road

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Hayley rushes to help two badly injured motorcyclists, while Ross and John haul in a drink-driver who has left a trail of destruction in his wake. Duncan has to escort a 176-wheel monster truck through Workington, Steve deals with a boy racer, Tom goes undercover on the trail of some suspected bike thieves, and Duggie plays gooseberry on a couple's first date

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Trainer Graeme Hall comes to the aid of more dog owners at their wits' end dealing with their four-legged friends. He helps a woman teach a determined Doberman to obey not just her but her elderly parents as well, reunites two dachshunds who have gone from the best of friends to the worst of enemies, and tries to calm the ardour of a hairdresser's French bulldog

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Nicolette and Chloe grow more vexed their overbearing house guests. Yashvi is not satisfied by Ned's explanation

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Fallout from the faked rat incident affects business for Mac and Alf. Tori begins the process of cancelling her dream wedding

programme.title: 10 Years Younger in 10 Days
programme.desc: Cherry Healey and the team meet mum of two Lisa, whose life was changed for ever after an accident at a family barbecue caused third-degree burns over 30 per cent of her body and left her barely recognisable. Over 10 days in the experts' care, Lisa tries a range of specialist cosmetic treatments to help with scarring and disfigurement, and she is given a masterclass in hair, make-up and fashion

programme.title: Aldi vs Lidl: Supermarket Wars
programme.desc: The success of the two German-owned supermarket chains, investigating their canny marketing ploys and aggressive sales techniques in their battle for domination. Insiders reveal the secrets behind both supermarkets' success and how they compete with their rivals, while the programme highlights the most tempting cut-price products that are the key to their success

programme.title: Levi Bellfield: 5 Mistakes That Caught a Killer
programme.desc: An investigation into the case of doorman and car clamper Levi Bellfield, who committed three murders - including that of schoolgirl Milly Dowler in 2002. But would he have gone on to claim even more victims had he not made a string of mistakes that alerted police? Interviews with detectives, including the officer who interrogated Bellfield, as well as a former partner of the murderer, reveal the errors that led to his arrest

programme.title: My Lover My Killer
programme.desc: The case of a man with a history of violence towards friends and partners, whose on-off girlfriend hoped to start a family together

programme.title: Insidious (2010)
programme.desc: A family experience strange events in their house and become convinced it is haunted. However, after moving on, they find the dark forces have followed them and when their son mysteriously falls into a coma, they must find a way to get rid of the paranormal entities tormenting them. Horror, starring Patrick Wilson and Rose Byrne

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Insidious (2010)
programme.desc: A family experience strange events in their house and become convinced it is haunted. However, after moving on, they find the dark forces have followed them and when their son mysteriously falls into a coma, they must find a way to get rid of the paranormal entities tormenting them. Horror, starring Patrick Wilson and Rose Byrne

programme.title: The Gypsies Next Door
programme.desc: In the Irish town of Thurles, the council want Barry to move into new housing purpose-built for travellers. But they will not allow him to take his 30 horses. Teenager Scarlett, who lives with her traveller family in Luton, dreams of being a successful model - and non-traveller model Danielle Mason is going to help show her the way

programme.title: Happy Campers: The Caravan Park
programme.desc: Holiday Resort Unit marketing guru Jonathan attempts to give old-school entertainment chief Chunkie Russell a new online look, while a Midlands couple are on a quest to buy their own static caravan. At Tencreek holiday park in Looe, yellow coat Andi unveils his alter ego Miss Champagne, and a new food-ordering app goes haywire, leaving catering manager Philomena all at sea

programme.title: Rich Kids Go Skint
programme.desc: The son of two millionaires moves in with a Leytonstone couple. He attempts to organise a birthday party on a budget, and is challenged by the kids on how much he does for charity

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Documentary following British people living it up on the Costa del Sol. Bambi shows newcomers Howard and Lynne around the caravan park and treats them to a Bollywood evening. But unaware to the couple the host has recently gone vegan, so it turns out to be a meat-free knees-up. Kim and Matt reopen their chip shop after a devastating fire which forced them to shut for a year and Harrison is down on the marina, trying to sell tickets for the Black Pearl pirate ship tour

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House
programme.desc: Well-off Tony and Sarah Page from West Yorkshire leave their eight-bedroom house behind to trade places with the Hollands, who live in a three-bedroom council house in a Hartlepool, and are in the country's poorest 10 per cent. They swap homes, budgets and lives for seven days as they see what it is like at the other end of the economic spectrum

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Jon and Brennan come to the aid of an emergency services worker in Bolton, whose got behind on her housework when she began looking after her mother, who has dementia

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: A high-speed night-time pursuit in Bradford heightens tensions in the local community, with outnumbered cops facing the prospect of a potential riot. An apparently routine stop takes a serious turn as the vehicle pulled over is thought to contain a firearm and the unarmed officers must hold their nerve as they wait for a specialist team to join them. Jamie Theakston narrates

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: A high-speed chase in Bradford is ended when CS gas is used to bring a determined speeder to justice, while teams are out on quiet back roads as they track two cars that are thought to be connected with various firearms offences. Plus, burglars find out they cannot outrun the cops when weighed down with a quad bike and trailing a cloud of cannabis behind them

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Andy collars a suspect thought to have caused criminal damage at a house party, but the father of the host arrives and inflames the situation, while Duggie and Mark respond to a report of a car that has been abandoned after being involved in a crash near Carlisle. In Barrow-in-Furness, the Tactical Support Group calls on Barry and his dog Lucky to sniff out some evidence after a drugs raid

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The team have their hands full when a raid reveals a crowbar-wielding suspect with a house full of drugs, a Taser and an offensive mouth

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Jon puts his body on the line as he tackles a drunken youth in a domestic dispute and Martin turns detective to catch a drink-driver who thinks she can get one over on the interceptors. A pizza delivery driver take fast food to the extreme, Doug gets to grips with a burglar and the hunt is on for Lincoln's answer to Harry Houdini

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Graeme Hall treats a ridgeback-boxer cross that has become aggressive towards other dogs after being attacked, and helps a cancer patient with a badly behaved golden retriever that is holding back her recovery. His last port of call is to a miniature pincher who objects to any men coming near its owner

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: The news that Pierce Greyson is returning to town ricochets around Ramsay Street. And he correctly determines Paul is having money troubles

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Stephen supports Leah, and Alf brushes off concerns about his health, but Tane notices him struggling and offers to help at the Bait Shop

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Graeme Hall helps Paul and Yvonne, whose Border Collie will not let them leave the house without a marathon bout of barking, while every phone call also sets the dog off. Graeme also meets a Labrador that becomes aggressive when there is food around, and a husky with a fear of stairs

programme.title: Happy Campers: The Caravan Park
programme.desc: in Looe, Cornwal, Tencreek hosts an end-of-season pirate party, but a blown-out barbecue threatens to bring a premature end to the celebrations. Over at Holiday Resort Unity in Somerset, entertainment chief Chunkie Russell welcomes an Amy Winehouse tribute act to the park, and head of security Simon discovers a caravan has been trashed

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Richard and Brennan come to the aid of a woman from Anglesey who has struggled with depression and hoarding tendencies since her divorce 10 years previously

programme.title: Here Come the Gypsies!
programme.desc: Revealing the hidden world of Gypsy and Traveller communities, delving into their unique traditions and codes to understand how this community continues to thrive. In South Wales, Romany Gypsy horse dealer Jim 'Beb' Price faces his toughest day of the year as he puts on his first ever horse drive. Meanwhile in Surrey, Romany Gypsy cage fighter Tony 'The Rhino' Giles arranges a bare-knuckle fight to settle a dispute between two warring Gypsy families

programme.title: Adults Only
programme.desc: Sex doll manufacturers, husband and wife team, Jade and Elliot launch a new custom dildo product line, while Dominatrix mistress Sofia trains a new apprentice in spanking, and 19-year-old escort Ellie leaves her home town of Nottingham in search of richer pickings from clients with deeper pockets

programme.title: Millionaire Age Gap Love
programme.desc: Part one of two. The popularity of age-gap relationships among the super-rich, meeting six millionaire couples who are decades apart. Stories include that of 37-year-old Carolyn, who landed a job at 54-year-old multi-millionaire John's insurance company, little knowing that within a year she would be engaged to her boss and promoted to CEO of Mansfield Town football club. Meanwhile, DIY millionaire Craig had his life turned upside down when he won the UK's first Big Brother. But now, aged 48, nothing could have prepared him for his whirlwind romance with 33-year-old Laura

programme.title: Extraordinary People
programme.desc: In 2010, US marine sergeant John Peck lost his arms and legs while serving in Afghanistan. Dissatisfied with his prosthetics and determined to regain his independence, he put himself forward for ground-breaking surgery. This documentary follows John as he undergoes a bilateral arm transplant in an extraordinary 10-hour operation with 20 surgical staff in attendance

programme.title: Rich Holiday, Poor Holiday
programme.desc: Roger and Lisa are used to spending more than £8,000 holidaying abroad in luxury villas with their young three children. And 100 miles west in Southport live Sue, Genna and Ray. Nan and mum work so much that they rarely have time for holidays. While Lisa and Roger have a trip to windy Wales in a campervan, Sue, Genna and Ray are treated to an all-expenses paid trip to a Devon manor frequented by the super-rich

programme.desc: The news that Pierce Greyson is returning to town ricochets around Ramsay Street. And he correctly determines Paul is having money troubles

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica travels to Wyoming to attend the funeral of an old friend, but instead finds herself investigating the mysterious death of a man everyone despised. Noah Beery Jr (The Rockford Files) and Stella Stevens (Flamingo Road) guest star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs revisits his home town to investigate an assault that left one marine dead and another badly injured, and enlists the help of his estranged father to identify the assailant. Suspicion initially falls on a local man whose daughter was dating the survivor of the attack - but later inquiries uncover a tangled tale of uncertain paternity and forbidden love. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Ralph Waite

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A marine is found murdered in his garage, and inquiries lead the agents to his former sergeant. However, Gibbs and the team soon find out that their man is under FBI witness protection as he is about to testify against a mobster, giving him a cast-iron alibi. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Joe Spano

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate the murder of memoir writer Sweetie Ness. Clues initially lead them to suspect his stalker, agent and a groupie, but after digging deeper into the victim's past, they begin to consider the possibility he was not who he claimed to be

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A woman's murder leads Lupo and Bernard to learn she was secretly in conflict with her husband, going against his desire that their family lead an environmentally friendly life. The case is complicated further when a dead passenger and drugs turn up in the car she was using, with the complexity continuing in the courtroom as Cutter suspects someone has been tampering with evidence. Guest starring Ned Beatty (Deliverance) and Sherry Stringfield (ER)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A narcotics detective plans a major drugs sting but makes the mistake of illegally using a teenager as bait - with fatal consequences. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The team investigates when a journalist is found murdered, but the case presents new evidence for an old crime involving a man serving a life sentence for spying for the Chinese government. Keith Carradine guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A girl is killed in a crime displaying all the hallmarks of white supremacists who recruit teenagers to carry out acts of violence, and the team races to bring the ringleader to justice before more youngsters are butchered. Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis re-examine a case closed since the 1960s after a vehicle containing the remains of a murdered man is dredged up from the Hudson River. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A serial killer begins posting footage of his crimes online - and as the agents investigate, they realise that each film contains visual clues to the identity of the next victim. In a further bizarre twist, Abby later finds what seems to be a new video on her computer - and the case takes on fresh urgency with the discovery that it is actually a live feed, suggesting the murderer is somewhere on the premises

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A bank at Quantico is robbed and a security guard killed, but the team soon discovers that stealing money may not have been the perpetrators' primary objective. Meanwhile, Gibbs is given the task of evaluating an inexperienced new agent assigned by Vance to help investigate the case. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Rey Valentin

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs sends DiNozzo and Ziva to retrieve top-secret information from a secure military base - a mission aimed at catching a mole in the NCIS ranks. Unfortunately, it soon becomes clear that the traitor is still at large - so the building is locked down and all agents are rounded up in a final effort to catch the culprit. Guest starring Jude Ciccolella

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a marine sergeant, who was hailed as a war hero in the States for his efforts overseas. Gibbs turns to medic Grace Confalone for advice after he uncharacteristically unravels and abandons his team at a crime scene investigation. Mark Harmon stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: An activist fighting for the rights of the Tamil people survives an assassination attempt at JFK airport, but it soon becomes clear that members of her close circle have also been targeted. Logan and Wheeler are soon on the case - and the investigation puts them on the trail of an unlikely Canadian gun-for-hire as they race to catch the would-be killer. Starring Chris Noth and Julianne Nicholson

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames discover a strange link between three murder victims - all have children who have been selected to go on the waiting list for an exclusive New York pre-school. Their inquiries eventually lead them to a distraught mother whose pushy mother-in-law has unwittingly driven her to kill - and end in a hostage crisis. Starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren infiltrates the psychiatric ward of a New York jail, without the knowledge of his superiors, to investigate disturbing allegations by his inmate nephew that prisoners are being systematically abused, tortured and even killed by sadistic guards. Drama, starring Vincent d'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: While investigating the execution-style killing of three college students on a basketball court, Logan struggles to understand what appears to be a motiveless triple murder. At a loss to identify a reason for the shooting, he must rely on the testimony of a survivor of the attack if he is to bring the killers to justice

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Bing Cullman suffers a heart attack and dies in his cellar shortly after hosting a wine tasting to sell rare vintages he unearthed in a basement. It seems like a straightforward case, but Goren and Eames find traces of a drug in a glass that would have reacted with the victim's medication and resulted in his death. Guest starring Adrian Pasdar (Heroes)

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames investigate the death of a wealthy philanthropist on the night he awarded his research grant to a doctor. After a medical cadaver is found wearing the victim's clothes, the detectives' attention soon turns to the recipient of the money and the two other candidates, and discover they all had a motive to commit the murder. Crime drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A bank at Quantico is robbed and a security guard killed, but the team soon discovers that stealing money may not have been the perpetrators' primary objective. programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate when lawyers Fred and Lizzy Bellamy are found murdered in their sleep. The case leads them to two couples who are in the process of adopting children from Haiti, but the detectives uncover signs of abuse that point to a human-trafficking ring

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate when a plaintiff involved in a high-profile lawsuit against airline Pan World is found dead in his car. The detectives soon discover the case had been delayed after the presiding judge was murdered and the clues lead to a lawyer willing to do anything for money

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Curtis and Briscoe investigate after a child in day care is injected with a fatal disease. They uncover a medical scandal of frightening proportions, and the child's own father comes under suspicion. Award-winning police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate the brutal murder of a TV reporter who had been alleging that a billionaire Wall Street investment adviser was a fraud. Evidence of love triangles and hedge fund fraud soon comes to the fore. Crime drama, starring Jeremy Sisto and Anthony Anderson

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A fire at an illicit nightclub leads to the deaths of 53 revellers, and the subsequent investigation prompts the detectives to question an arsonist who unwittingly reveals his involvement in an illegal immigrant racket

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis hunt for the suspected killer of a parolee - but matters are complicated by the discovery that two bounty hunters are also pursuing their quarry. Acclaimed drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Having identified the mole in their ranks, the agents arrest the traitor's contact Ted Bankston, a former NSA agent working for a kidnapper code-named the Weatherman - who is making millions on the stock markets out of stolen military data. Drama, with Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Cote de Pablo

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A petty officer is killed in what initially seems to be a road-rage incident - until investigations reveal evidence of foul play. Digging deeper, the team finds the dead man belonged to an underground fight club, and sets about discovering whether his involvement was a factor in the case. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: As Christmas approaches, the team works overtime to solve a robbery - a case made doubly difficult by the fact that the prime suspect is a former petty officer who has supposedly been dead for 17 years. Eventually arrested at a Vietnam memorial, he manages to convince Gibbs of his innocence - but a discovery in the forensics lab suggests he may be guilty after all. Guest starring Peter Coyote

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames investigate the kidnap and murder of a prominent atheist, and discover the crime was motivated not only by greed, but also by a need for sympathy and publicity. As events unfold, the victim's abductors are also found dead, and it becomes clear an unknown mastermind is pulling the strings. Detective drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio, Kathryn Erbe and Jamey Sheridan

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: When the hostess of a rock 'n' roll chat show is found murdered in her home, a web of intrigue slowly reveals itself to Logan and Wheeler, linking the woman's death with an ageing musician who seems to be involved in a case of child abuse

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A magician disappears during a live-burial trick and is later found dead miles away from the location of his performance. Goren and Eames' investigation takes them deep into the mysterious world of magic as they try to unravel the conjuror's final act to identify the murderer

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Under suspension pending a psychiatric evaluation, Goren places his life and career in jeopardy by working undercover to take down a high-profile drug-dealer - and expose two corrupt police officers in the process. Crime drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: An arrogant gossip columnist is murdered, and Logan enlists the help of Megan Wheeler, back in the US after working undercover in Europe, to help him investigate a related celebrity sex scandal. However, as the duo scrutinise the dead man's life, the list of possible suspects grows increasingly longer

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Broadway star Marc Landry falls to his death after his flying harness fails during a performance of a play based on the Greek myth of Icarus. Goren and Eames are called in when it becomes clear the rigging had been tampered with, and the detectives talk to director Amanda Rollins about the significance of a bouquet of flowers with peacock feathers delivered to the victim. Goren also pays a visit to old friend and mythology lecturer Cleo Andrews for expert advice. Guest starring Cynthia Nixon and Patti Smith

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: In the last-ever episode of the long-running crime drama, twins Parker and Thomas Gaffney are found dead in the offices of a successful internet dating website. It emerges they believed the company's owner Danielle Magee had stolen their business idea after they employed her as a programmer and had filed a lawsuit against her. Goren attends his final therapy session and finds his future in the force is in question. Vincent D'Onofrio stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate when Harold and Joyce Foley arrive home to find their son and housekeeper murdered. The detectives start to believe the couple's work on a controversial pharmaceutical study made them targets, until further evidence changes their minds

programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate when a trucking company owner is found murdered. They suspect his business partner Stan Klein is the culprit when they discover his links to the Russian mob and a scheme to defraud the victim, but as the case comes to court it seems Klein's son may have had reason to kill

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the murder of a doctor at a fertility clinic, but are embroiled in a dispute between two women over the ownership of frozen embryos. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate when an illegal immigrant is attacked, and the incident is connected to a spate of hate crimes against Hispanic men. The prosecution of some teenagers for the crime proves to be a thorny and delicate issue for the District Attorney's office

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis join forces with their Baltimore colleagues to investigate the murder of a government official. It soon emerges that the deceased had been stalked by a man because of her lesbian affair with a married woman, who pleads for her identity to be kept secret. However, an over-zealous attorney embarks on a crusade to make the information public knowledge, going so far as to take the officers to court in an effort to force them to reveal their source - but his interest in the case raises suspicions

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The officers discover a girl's body in a hospital emergency room, and the subsequent investigation leads to the revelation that she was killed during an unauthorised exorcism carried out by an overzealous nun who claims her behaviour was directed by the voice of an angel. Jerry Orbach and Sam Waterston star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: McGee is sent to a women's prison to interview a murder suspect, but ends up being captured by the inmates, who have run riot and seized control of a cell block, afraid they will be blamed for killing a guard. Held hostage as a bargaining chip, he tries to identify the real culprit before the warden takes drastic action to resolve the crisis

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Ducky is attacked by a knife-wielding woman who accuses him of war crimes, alleging he tortured and killed her brother in Afghanistan in the early 1980s. Gibbs investigates and ascertains what really happened - but has to work with the Afghan embassy to avoid an international incident. Drama, starring David McCallum

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The agents investigate the private life of a murdered Navy captain whose actions may have led to his death, while McGee finds his ideal woman on the internet - but it turns out she is too good to be true. Crime drama, starring Sean Murray, Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: Dead Man Walking (1995)

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: Sara Cox presents the final, in which the last three potters have to make a pair of identical, fully functioning light features from porcelain, the delicate clay that is the trickiest to work with. But that's not all. In the spot test, they are challenged to sculpt the torso of a special guest, ice dancer Sylvian Longchambon, and in the throw down they must make as many Japanese lanterns as they can in 10 minutes. But as this is the final, they have to do it the authentic Japanese way, with the wheel turning clockwise - the opposite of what they are used to. After all their hard work, who will be judged the winner?

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Amanda Holden takes part in the popular genealogy documentary, in which famous faces trace their family trees. The actress and presenter looks into the rumoured French ancestry on her mother's side of the family, an investigation that leads to an extraordinary Napoleonic-era cross-Channel romance. But she doesn't stop there. The suicide of her paternal grandfather has always loomed large over her family - and when his story takes her to France once again, she is moved to discover how he helped others through a harrowing tragedy

When he died in 2007, he was the longest-serving prisoner in Britain

programme.title: The Queen's Cavalry
programme.desc: The trainee troopers prepare for their final riding exam over one of the Army's toughest courses. Originally hopeless horseman Glenn is apprehensive - as is Adrian Van Loon, whose kit often fails to meet the rigorous standards. Gunners from the armoured regiment practise on the firing range with live ammunition, and the Household Cavalry's historian talks about their role in the battle of Waterloo

programme.title: The Queen's Cavalry
programme.desc: After passing their riding course - one of the toughest in the country - the new troopers graduate. The latest additions to the regiment parade in full ceremonial uniform to mark the occasion - but the last such outing of the season also provides a chance for the soldiers to reflect on fallen comrades in conflicts from World War Two to Iraq

programme.title: Blackmail (1929)
programme.desc: A woman accidentally kills a would-be attacker in self-defence, and quickly flees the scene - but a sinister figure witnesses the event and attempts to blackmail her. Atmospheric early Hitchcock thriller, starring John Longden, Anny Ondra, Sara Allgood and Charles Paton

programme.title: The World of Henry Orient (1964)
programme.desc: Two wealthy teenage girls idolise a womanising pianist and follow him around New York, thwarting his efforts to seduce a married woman. Slapstick comedy, with Peter Sellers, Tippy Walker, Merrie Spaeth and Tom Bosley

programme.title: The Food Inspectors
programme.desc: Chris Hollins and Gaby Roslin find out exactly what's in chicken nuggets, comparing the shop-bought variety with home-made ones, and Matt Allwright reports on the single biggest problem facing the poultry industry - campylobacter, a bacteria and common cause of food poisoning that can be deadly. Chris gets a lesson in the best way to clean and cook herbs from Michelin-starred chef Atul Kochhar, and Coventry food safety officer Nicki inspects a takeaway, where she is horrified to come across the worst infestation of cockroaches she has ever seen

programme.title: The Fixers
programme.desc: Four passionate builders, in ten remote locations, have one mission: to improve lives. They will do whatever it takes-saving the world, one build at a time

programme.title: Queensbury Boxing League
programme.desc: Boxers battle it out over three four and five two minute rounds against opponents - the most successful competitors will earn the right to challenge for the coveted Queensbury British title

programme.title: Go With Me (2015)
programme.desc: A woman returns to the isolated logging community where she grew up, and is stalked by a former cop, who now heads up a criminal organisation in the area that operates above the law. She resolves to take a stand against him, seeking the aid of a retired logger and his sidekick. Thriller based on Castle Freeman Jr's novel, starring Julia Stiles, Anthony Hopkins, Alexander Ludwig and Ray Liotta

programme.title: One Night in Powder (2015)
programme.desc: A clueless music promoter hits the streets of East London, hoping to put together the greatest club night the capital has ever seen, and recruiting the most eccentric residents of Dalston to help him. Documentary-style comedy, starring Jason Attar

programme.title: Spivs (2004)
programme.desc: A professional con-man spends his time honing the skills of his protege and making sure his gang of conniving criminals stays out of trouble. However, when a simple heist backfires the ragtag group are left with a lorry-load of illegal immigrants on their hands - and an angry smuggler with revenge on his mind soon adds to their woes. Crime drama, starring Ken Stott,, Nick Moran and Dominic Monaghan

programme.desc: Bradford City v Northampton Town. Action from the 2012/13 League Two play-off final at Wembley Stadium, where promotion to League One awaited the winners. The Bantams were making their second appearance of the season at Wembley having also reached the League Cup final following an outstanding giant-killing run, and they needed to come from behind to edge out Burton Albion to reach this stage. The Cobblers ended a run of recent poor form to win 1-0 in both legs of their semi-final against Cheltenham Town to move within one match of reaching the third tier of English football
